summary: Complete testing of Admin Field Mode Verification & Hardening. All 8 backend tests PASSED. All 6 frontend acceptance criteria VERIFIED via Playwright. Admin sees 'Теренен портал' under 'Обекти', admin /tech shows 'Админ режим' badge + all 13 sites, technician sees limited sidebar (6 items), route protection redirects admin routes to /tech for technician, audit markers (entered_by_admin, entry_mode) correctly saved and propagated to work_sessions.
seed_data_creation: Technician password reset to TechTest123!Secure via conftest.py fixture
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Field Mode fully tested. Key findings: 1) Admin sidebar has 'Теренен портал' under 'Обекти' group (data-testid='nav-fieldPortal'), 2) Admin /tech shows 'Админ режим' badge and all 13 sites, 3) Technician sidebar limited to 6 items (techDashboard, dashboard, myDay, history, projects, myPayslips), 4) AdminRoute guard in App.js redirects non-admin roles to /tech, 5) Audit markers (entered_by_admin, entry_mode) saved in employee_daily_reports and propagated to work_sessions on approval.

Approve propagates audit markers.note: work_session inherits entered_by_admin and entry_mode from report

Site detail access.note: Both admin and technician can access site detail for their projects
